headline: Exploring the top movers within the S&P500 index during today's session.
summary: Stay updated with the movements of the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Monday. Discover which stocks are leading as top gainers and losers in today's session.

headline: Alger Russell Innovation Index Updates for First Quarter 2026
summary: Fred Alger Management, LLC ("Alger"), a privately held growth equity investment manager, today announced the quarterly rebalancing of the Alger Russell Innovation Index ("Index"). Following the close of trading on Friday, March 20, 2026, the Index will be rebalanced, and the following changes will be effective.

headline: Paycom’s Expanded US$1.46b Credit Line Versus Depressed Share Price
summary: Paycom Software expanded its credit facility to $1.46b, increasing available liquidity. The updated facility is intended to provide more flexibility for future growth opportunities. This move comes as NYSE:PAYC trades at $125.71 following sizeable multi year share price declines. For investors watching NYSE:PAYC, the timing of this $1.46b credit facility matters. The stock closed at $125.71, with returns of a 9.1% decline over the past week, a 17.5% decline year to date, and a 41.3% decline...
